_doc: Held-out END-TO-END test set: live repos with a published label about STAR authenticity (not repo quality/malware). Labels are probabilistic and DATED — GitHub strips fake stars over time, so a once-flagged repo may now score clean (e.g. dagster's confessed-bought frasermarlow/tap-bls fell from 600 stars to 6). Treat as 'the tool should rank manipulated repos higher than organic', not a hard pass/fail. NOT used in calibration (golden.json) — purely for validate_repos.py.

manipulated.evidence: flagged; very low watcher/fork ratio for 180k stars
documented inflated stars; low fork ratio

manipulated.drift: fake stars may be partly stripped since 2025
now more forks than stars; likely cleaned

_dropped: etherspot-sdk (25.7%) and joystream (19.9%) removed: only a minority of stars were fake, so they are weak positives, not owner-manipulated.
